rulings.Case Title: EUGENE MILLARD VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendants Bayer Cropscience, Inc.; Foster Wheeler, Llc; Perini Corporation; And Swinerton Builders Motion For Protective Order Regarding Plaintiff¿S Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 15, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT COLLINS ELECTRICAL COMPANY, INC.'s Joinder To Defendants Bayer Cropscience, Inc., Foster Wheeler, LLC, Perini Corporation And Swinerton Builders' Motion For Protective Order Regarding Plaintiffs' Deposition. All joinders to the motion for protective order are also off calendar based on the assumption that the parties have resolved the issues raised by the motion. If this assumption is incorrect, the parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm today to state, without further argument, what issues remain in dispute and then must appear at the hearing tomorrow at 9:00 am. =(220/HEK)
